nodes.title: villain
nodes.body: Villain is loose-passive (VPIP 58%, PFR 14%) and folds to hero flop c-bets 19/34 times (56%). River aggression shows up in 3/200 hands (2%). Villain has won 67 of 77 showdowns.

nodes.title: Folds to flop c-bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero flop c-bet 19 times across 34 c-bet opportunities.

nodes.title: Folds to river bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero river bets 11 times across 13 river bet opportunities.

nodes.title: River aggressor
nodes.body: Villain has bet or raised the river in 3 completed hands.

nodes.title: Strong showdown caller
nodes.body: Villain has won 67 of 77 showdowns (87%). When villain calls to showdown their range is strong — bluffing at showdown is likely -EV.
